holy.description: Invokes the power of the Light to heal and protect allies and vanquish evil from the darkest corners of the world. Preferred Weapon: Sword, Mace, and Shield

left.name: Lightsmith
left.description: Lightsmiths have developed such masterful control over the Light that they are able to wield it tangibly, employing constructs to empower their weapons and defenses and to protect their allies.

right.name: Herald of the Sun
right.description: Heralds of the Sun develop a deep bond to the sun and solar energy, using it to burn enemies and cauterize their allies' wounds. They can manifest potent solar rays while fully connected to the Light.

nodes.name: Lay on Hands
nodes.description:
Heals a friendly target for an amount equal to 100% your maximum health.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Auras of the Resolute
nodes.description:
Learn Concentration Aura, Devotion Aura, and Crusader Aura:

Concentration Aura:
Interrupt and Silence effects on party and raid members within 40 yds are 30% shorter. 

 Devotion Aura:
Party and raid members within 40 yds are bolstered by their devotion, reducing damage taken by 3%.

 Crusader Aura:
Increases mounted speed by 20% for all party and raid members within 40 yds.

nodes.name: Hammer of Wrath
nodes.description:
During Avenging Wrath, Judgment is empowered into Hammer of Wrath.

 Hammer of Wrath
Hurls a divine hammer that strikes an enemy for 44 Holy damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Improved Cleanse
nodes.description: Cleanse additionally removes all Disease and Poison effects.

nodes.name: Empyreal Ward
nodes.description: Lay on Hands grants the target 30% increased armor for 8 sec and now ignores healing reduction effects.

nodes.name: Fist of Justice
nodes.description: Hammer of Justice's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Blinding Light
nodes.description: Emits dazzling light in all directions, blinding enemies within 10 yds, causing them to wander disoriented for 6 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Turn Evil
nodes.description: The power of the Light compels an Undead, Aberration, or Demon target to flee for up to 40 sec. Damage may break the effect. Lesser creatures have a chance to be destroyed. Only one target can be turned at a time.

nodes.name: A Just Reward
nodes.description: After Cleanse successfully removes an effect from an ally, they are healed for 2,052.

nodes.name: Afterimage
nodes.description: After you spend 20 Holy Power, your next Word of Glory echoes onto a nearby ally at 30% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Guided Prayer
nodes.description:
When your health is brought below 25%, you instantly cast a free Word of Glory at 60% effectiveness on yourself.

Cannot occur more than once every 60 sec.

nodes.name: Divine Steed
nodes.description: Leap atop your Charger for 3 sec, increasing movement speed by 100%. Usable while indoors or in combat.

nodes.name: Light's Countenance
nodes.description: The cooldown of Blinding Light is reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Greater Judgment
nodes.description: Judgment deems the target unworthy, preventing the next 1,835 damage dealt by the target.

choices.name: Wrench Evil
choices.description: Turn Evil's cast time is reduced by 100%.

choices.name: Stand Against Evil
choices.description: Turn Evil now affects 5 additional enemies.

nodes.name: Holy Reprieve
nodes.description: Your Forbearance's duration is reduced by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Cavalier
nodes.description: Divine Steed now has 2 charges.

nodes.name: Divine Spurs
nodes.description: Divine Steed's cooldown is reduced by 20%, but its duration is reduced by 40%.

choices.name: Steed of Liberty
choices.description:
Divine Steed also grants Blessing of Freedom for 3.0 sec.

 Blessing of Freedom:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to movement impairing effects for 8 sec.

choices.name: Blessing of Freedom
choices.description: Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to movement impairing effects for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Armory of Light
nodes.description:
While holding a shield, you have a 15% chance to block incoming spells, reducing their damage by 20%. 

Without a shield, you have a 15% chance to parry incoming melee attacks, reducing their damage by 20%.

nodes.name: Obduracy
nodes.description: Speed increased by 2% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 2%.

choices.name: Divine Toll
choices.description: Instantly cast Holy Shock, Avenger's Shield, or Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

choices.name: Holy Prism
choices.description:
Fires a beam of light that scatters to strike a clump of targets. 

If the beam is aimed at an enemy target, it deals 2,501 Holy damage and radiates 2,647 healing to 5 allies within 30 yds.

If the beam is aimed at a friendly target, it heals for 6,126 and radiates 936 Holy damage to 5 enemies within 30 yds.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

choices.name: Echoing Blessings
choices.description: Blessing of Freedom increases the target's movement speed by 30%. Blessing of Protection and Blessing of Sacrifice reduce the target's damage taken by 15%. These effects linger for 8 sec after the Blessing ends.

choices.name: Unbound Freedom
choices.description: Blessing of Freedom increases movement speed by 30%, and you gain Blessing of Freedom when cast on a friendly target.

nodes.name: Sanctified Plates
nodes.description: Armor increased by 10%, Stamina increased by 5% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%.

nodes.name: Divine Reach
nodes.description: The radius of your auras is increased by 20 yds.

nodes.name: Brought to Light
nodes.description: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor causes you to explode with holy energy, healing up to 5 nearby allies and yourself for 175, split evenly among them.

nodes.name: Blessing of Sacrifice
nodes.description:
Blesses a party or raid member, reducing their damage taken by 30%, but you suffer 100% of damage prevented.

Last 12 sec, or until transferred damage would cause you to fall below 20% health.

choices.name: Divine Resonance
choices.description: After casting Holy Prism, Holy Armament, or Divine Toll, you instantly cast Holy Shock every 5 sec for 15 sec.

choices.name: Quickened Invocation
choices.description: Divine Toll's, Holy Armament's, and Holy Prism's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Blessing of Protection
nodes.description:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to Physical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Fear No Evil
nodes.description: Fear duration on you reduced by 20%. This effect is increased to 60% during Avenging Wrath.

nodes.name: Consecrated Ground
nodes.description: Your Consecration is 15% larger, and enemies within it have 50% reduced movement speed.

nodes.name: Holy Aegis
nodes.description: Armor and critical strike chance increased by 4%.

choices.name: Sacrifice of the Just
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Sacrifice by 60 sec.

choices.name: Recompense
choices.description:
After your Blessing of Sacrifice ends, 50% of the total damage it diverted is added to your next Judgment as bonus damage, or your next Word of Glory as bonus healing.

This effect's bonus damage cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health and its bonus healing cannot exceed 100% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Sacred Strength
choices.description: Holy Power spending abilities have 2% increased damage and healing.

choices.name: Divine Purpose
choices.description: Holy Power spending abilities have a 15% chance to make your next Holy Power spending ability free and deal 15% increased damage and healing.

nodes.name: Improved Blessing of Protection
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Protection by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Unbreakable Spirit
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Divine Shield, Divine Protection, and Lay on Hands by 30%.

nodes.name: Lightforged Blessing
nodes.description: Shield of the Righteous heals you and up to 2 nearby allies for 35.

nodes.name: Lightforged Blessing
nodes.description: Shield of the Righteous heals you and up to 2 nearby allies for 35.

nodes.name: Lead the Charge
nodes.description:
Divine Steed reduces the cooldown of 4 nearby ally's major movement ability by 3.0 sec.

Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Worthy Sacrifice
choices.description:
You automatically cast Blessing of Sacrifice onto an ally within 40 yds when they are below 35% health and you are not in a loss of control effect.

This effect activates 100% of Blessing of Sacrifice's cooldown.

choices.name: Righteous Protection
choices.description: Blessing of Sacrifice now removes and prevents all Poison and Disease effects.

nodes.name: Holy Ritual
nodes.description: Allies are healed for 7,562 when you cast Blessing of Protection or Blessing of Sacrifice on them.

nodes.name: Blessed Calling
nodes.description: Allies affected by your Blessings have 15% increased movement speed.

nodes.name: Inspired Guard
nodes.description: Divine Protection increases healing taken by 15% for its duration.

nodes.name: Light's Revocation
nodes.description:
Removing harmful effects with Divine Shield heals you for 10% for each effect removed.  This heal cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Divine Shield may now be cast while Forbearance is active.

nodes.name: Faith's Armor
nodes.description: Word of Glory grants 20% bonus armor for 4.5 sec.

nodes.name: Stoicism
nodes.description: The duration of stun effects on you is reduced by 20%.

nodes.name: Seal of Might
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 2% and Intellect increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Vengeful Wrath
nodes.description: Hammer of Wrath deals up to 25% additional damage based on its target's health. Lower health targets receive more damage.

nodes.name: Eye for an Eye
nodes.description: Melee and ranged attackers receive 133 Holy damage each time they strike you during Divine Protection and Divine Shield.

choices.name: Golden Path
choices.description: Consecration heals you and 5 allies within it for 2 every 0.9 sec.

choices.name: Selfless Healer
choices.description: Flash of Light and Holy Light are 30% more effective on your allies and 40% of the healing done also heals you.

nodes.name: Blessing of Dawn
nodes.description: While you are above 85% health, 5% of all damage taken by allies within 20 yds is redirected to you, up to a maximum of 1,527 every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Lightbearer
nodes.description: 10% of all healing done to you from other sources heals up to 4 nearby allies, divided evenly among them.

nodes.name: Blessing of Dusk
nodes.description: Damage taken reduced by up to 10%, increasing as your health decreases.

nodes.name: Holy Shock
nodes.description:
Triggers a burst of Light on the target, dealing 816 Holy damage to an enemy, or 2,556 healing to an ally.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Infusion of Light
nodes.description:
Your Holy Shocks have a 10% chance to empower your next spell cast:

Flash of Light: healing increased by 200% and becomes instant cast.
Judgment: Greater Judgment prevents an additional 150% damage dealt by the target and generates 1 additional Holy Power.

nodes.name: Light of Dawn
nodes.description: Unleashes Holy energy, healing up to 5 injured allies within a 40 yd radius around you for 1,925.

nodes.name: Light's Conviction
nodes.description: Holy Shock now has 2 charges and it refunds 50% of its mana cost when cast on an enemy.

nodes.name: Aura Mastery
nodes.description:
Empowers your chosen aura for 8 sec.

Devotion Aura: Damage reduction increased to 12%.

Crusader Aura: Mount speed bonus increased to 60%.

Concentration Aura: Affected allies immune to interrupts and silences.

nodes.name: Beacon of the Lightbringer
nodes.description: Mastery: Lightbringer now increases your healing based on the target's proximity to either you or your Beacon of Light, whichever is closer.

nodes.name: Extrication
nodes.description: Word of Glory and Light of Dawn gain up to 30% additional chance to critically strike, based on their target's current health. Lower health targets are more likely to be critically struck.

nodes.name: Ringing of the Heavens
nodes.description: Activating Aura Mastery also casts a Divine Toll at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Unending Light
nodes.description: Light of Dawn receives 20% increased benefit from Mastery: Lightbringer.

nodes.name: Awestruck
nodes.description: Holy Shock, Holy Light, and Flash of Light critical healing increased by 20%.

choices.name: Moment of Compassion
choices.description: Your Flash of Light heals for an additional 50% when cast on a target affected by your Beacon of Light.

choices.name: Resplendent Light
choices.description: Holy Light heals up to 5 targets within 12 yds for 8% of its healing.

nodes.name: Divine Favor
nodes.description: The mana cost of Holy Light is reduced by 10% and its cast time is reduced by 15%.

choices.name: Unwavering Spirit
choices.description: The cooldown of Aura Mastery is reduced by 30 sec.

choices.name: Protection of Tyr
choices.description: Aura Mastery also increases all healing received by party or raid members within 40 yards by 10%.

nodes.name: Imbued Infusions
nodes.description: Consuming Infusion of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Shock by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Light of the Martyr
nodes.description: While above 80% health, Holy Shock's healing is increased 20%, but creates a heal absorb on you for 30% of the amount healed that prevents Beacon of Light from healing you until it has dissipated.

nodes.name: Righteous Judgment
nodes.description:
Judgment has a 100% chance to cast Consecration at the target's location.

The limit on Consecration does not apply to this effect.

nodes.name: Saved by the Light
nodes.description: When an ally with your Beacon of Light is damaged, they absorb the next 57 damage, increasing by up to 300% based on their current health. Lower health allies are shielded for more.

nodes.name: Light's Protection
nodes.description: Allies with Beacon of Light receive 5% less damage.

nodes.name: Overflowing Light
nodes.description: 30% of Holy Shock's overhealing is converted into an absorb shield. The shield amount cannot exceed 10% of your max health.

nodes.name: Shining Righteousness
nodes.description:
Shield of the Righteous deals 972 damage to its first target struck.

Shield of the Righteous now has a 35% chance to activate Divine Purpose if talented.

choices.name: Liberation
choices.description: 12% of Word of Glory and Light of Dawn's healing is converted into Holy damage that strikes a nearby enemy.

choices.name: Crusader's Might
choices.description: Holy Shock reduces the cooldown of Judgment by 1.5 sec and Crusader Strike reduces the cooldown of Judgment by 1.5 sec.

nodes.name: Tirion's Devotion
nodes.description: Lay on Hands' cooldown is reduced by 30% and restores 5% of your Mana.

nodes.name: Commanding Light
nodes.description: Beacon of Light transfers an additional 5% of the amount healed.

nodes.name: Glistening Radiance
nodes.description: While at maximum health, targets with Beacon of Light generate an absorb shield equal to 1% of their health every 3 sec, up to a maximum of 5%.

nodes.name: Breaking Dawn
nodes.description: Increases Light of Dawn's healing by 5%.

nodes.name: Divine Revelations
nodes.description: While empowered by Infusion of Light, Flash of Light heals for an additional 20% and Judgment refunds 0.5% of your maximum mana.

nodes.name: Divine Glimpse
nodes.description: Holy Shock and Judgment have a 8% increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Bestow Light
nodes.description:
Light of the Martyr's health threshold is reduced to 70% and increases Holy Shock's healing by an additional 5% for every 5 sec Light of the Martyr is active, stacking up to 3 times.

While below 70% health, the light urgently heals you for 76 every 1 sec.

choices.name: Beacon of Faith
choices.description: Mark a second target as a Beacon, mimicking the effects of Beacon of Light. Your heals will now heal both of your Beacons, but at 30% reduced effectiveness.

choices.name: Beacon of Virtue
choices.description:
Apply a Beacon of Light to your target and 4 injured allies within 30 yds for 9 sec.

All affected allies will be healed for 10% of the amount of your other healing done.

nodes.name: Empyrean Legacy
nodes.description: Judgment critical strikes empower your next Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn at 30% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Veneration
nodes.description:
Judgment grants an absorb shield on up to 5 injured allies for 8% of the damage done, split evenly among them.

Flash of Light and Holy Light critical strikes reset the cooldown of Judgment.

choices.name: Avenging Wrath
choices.description: Call upon the Light to become an avatar of retribution, increasing your damage, healing, and critical strike chance by 20% for 20 sec.

choices.name: Avenging Crusader
choices.description:
You become the ultimate crusader of light, for 15 sec. Auto-attack damage is increased by 1,000%, Judgment and Crusader Strike heal up to 5 injured allies within 40 yds for 80% of the damage done, split evenly among them.

This spell is replaced with Crusader Strike while active.

Crusader Strike:
Strike the target for 49 Physical damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Reclamation
nodes.description: Holy Shock refunds up to 10% of its Mana cost and deals up to 50% more healing or damage, based on the target's missing health.

nodes.name: Pillars of Light
nodes.description:
Beacon of Faith:
Allies with Beacon of Light or Beacon of Faith are healed for 125 every 3 sec.

 Beacon of Virtue:
Beacon of Virtue instantly heals allies for 1,484.

nodes.name: Seek Deliverance
nodes.description:
While Avenging Wrath is not active, you gain 5% Mastery.

While Avenging Wrath is active, you gain 30% movement speed.

choices.name: Sanctified Wrath
choices.description: Avenging Wrath and Avenging Crusader have 25% increased duration.

choices.name: Awakening
choices.description:
While in combat, your Holy Power spenders have a 10% chance to cause your next Judgment to deal 30% increased damage and critically strike.

Activating Avenging Wrath activates Awakening.

nodes.name: Call of the Righteous
nodes.description:
Avenging Wrath's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, but its duration is reduced by 4.0 sec.

Avenging Crusader's cooldown is reduced by 7.5 sec, but its duration is reduced by 2.5 sec.

nodes.name: Truth Prevails
nodes.description: Judgment heals you for 912 and its mana cost is reduced by 30%. 50% of overhealing from this effect is transferred onto 2 allies within 40 yds.

nodes.name: Divine Overload
nodes.description: Holy Light's healing is increased by 30%, but its mana cost is increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Rising Sunlight
nodes.description: Your healing is increased by up to 10%, based on the average health percentage of allies with your Beacon of Light.

nodes.name: Glorious Dawn
nodes.description: Holy Shock has a 12% chance to refund a charge when cast and its healing is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Seraphic Barrier
nodes.description: Word of Glory and Light of Dawn now convert 15% of their healing into an absorb shield instead.

choices.name: Tyr's Deliverance
choices.description:
Activating Avenging Wrath releases the Light within yourself, healing 5 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every 0.9 sec within 40 yds for 133.

Allies healed also receive 10% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for 12 sec.

choices.name: Hand of Divinity
choices.description: Activating Avenging Wrath calls upon the Light to empower you, causing your next 2 Holy Lights to be instant cast and cost 50% less mana.

nodes.name: Inflorescence of the Sunwell
nodes.description: Infusion of Light has 1 additional charge.

ranks.description:
While in combat, apply a Beacon of the Savior to the lowest health ally within 30 yds that causes your direct healing on others to also heal that ally for 10% of the amount healed.

Beacon of the Savior transfers to the lowest health ally within 30 yds if it heals a target past maximum health or if an ally drops below 50% health.
Beacon of the Savior transfers an additional 10% of the amount healed and allies with Beacon of the Savior receive 10% more healing from you.

Every 8 sec or when Beacon of the Savior transfers to a new injured target, they are granted an absorb shield that prevents the next 1,076 damage and reduces damage taken by 10% for 15 sec.

Beacon of the Savior now additionally follows the target of your Holy Light and Flash of Light spells once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Solidarity
nodes.description:
If you bestow an Armament upon an ally, you also gain its benefits.

If you bestow an Armament upon yourself, a nearby ally also gains its benefits.

nodes.name: Valiance
nodes.description: Consuming Infusion of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Armaments by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Blessing of the Forge
nodes.description: Avenging Wrath summons an additional Sacred Weapon, and during Avenging Wrath your Sacred Weapon casts spells on your target and echoes the effects of your Holy Power abilities.

choices.name: Divine Inspiration
choices.description: Your spells and abilities have a chance to manifest a Holy Armament for a nearby ally.

choices.name: Forewarning
choices.description: The cooldown of Holy Armaments is reduced by 20%.

choices.name: Authoritative Rebuke
choices.description: Successfully dispelling a harmful effect reduces Cleanse's cooldown by 1.0 sec. Effect increased by 100% while wielding a Holy Armament.

choices.name: Tempered in Battle
choices.description:
When you or an ally wielding a Holy Bulwark are healed above maximum health, transfer 100% of the overhealing to your ally.

When you or an ally wielding a Sacred Weapon drop below 40% health, redistribute your health immediately and every 1 sec for 4 sec. May only occur once per cast.

choices.name: Rite of Sanctification
choices.description:
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 2%.

Lasts 1 hour.

choices.name: Rite of Adjuration
choices.description:
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your Stamina by 3% and causing your Holy Power abilities to sometimes unleash a burst of healing around a target.

Lasts 1 hour.

choices.name: Divine Guidance
choices.description: For each Holy Power ability cast, your next Consecration deals 1,140 damage or healing immediately, split across all enemies and allies.

choices.name: Blessed Assurance
choices.description: Casting a Holy Power ability increases the damage and healing of your next Crusader Strike by 200%.

nodes.name: Laying Down Arms
nodes.description: When an Armament fades from you, the cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced by 15.0 sec and you gain Infusion of Light.

nodes.name: Shared Resolve
nodes.description: The effect of your active Aura is increased by 33% on targets with your Armaments.

nodes.name: Reflection of Radiance
nodes.description: When your Holy Bulwark absorbs damage or your Sacred Weapon deals damage or healing, you have a chance to gain Awakening.

nodes.name: Masterwork
nodes.description: After casting a Holy Armament, your next 3 abilities cast a Lesser Armament of the same kind on a nearby ally.

nodes.name: Hammer and Anvil
nodes.description: Judgment critical strikes cause a shockwave around the target, healing to up to 5 injuried allies for 430.

nodes.name: Resounding Strike
nodes.description: Holy Armaments activate Hammer and Anvil at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Holy Armaments
nodes.description:
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Aurora
nodes.description:
After you cast Holy Prism or Divine Toll, gain Divine Purpose.

 Divine Purpose
Your next Holy Power spending ability is free and deals 15% increased damage and healing.

choices.name: Blessing of An'she
choices.description: The healing and damage of Holy Shock is increased by 15%.

choices.name: Lingering Radiance
choices.description: Dawnlight leaves an Eternal Flame for 6 sec on allies or a Greater Judgment on enemies when it expires or is extended.

nodes.name: Sun Sear
nodes.description: Holy Shock and Light of Dawn critical strikes cause the target to be healed for an additional 281 over 4 sec.

choices.name: Morning Star
choices.description:
Every 5.0 sec, your next Dawnlight's damage or healing is increased by 5%, stacking up to 10 times.

Morning Star stacks twice as fast while out of combat.

choices.name: Gleaming Rays
choices.description: Your Holy Power spenders deal 3% additional damage and healing.

nodes.name: Luminosity
nodes.description: Critical Strike chance of Holy Shock and Light of Dawn increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Second Sunrise
nodes.description: Light of Dawn and Holy Shock have a 15% chance to cast again at 30% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Walk Into Light
nodes.description: Infusion of Light occurs 100% more often during Avenging Wrath.

nodes.name: Eternal Flame
nodes.description:
Heals an ally for 1,436 and an additional 465 over 16 sec.

Healing increased by 25% when cast on self.

choices.name: Illumine
choices.description: Dawnlight reduces the movement speed of enemies by 50% and increases the movement speed of allies by 20%.

choices.name: Will of the Dawn
choices.description:
Movement speed increased by 5% while above 80% health.

When your health is brought below 35%, your movement speed is increased by 40% for 5 sec. Cannot occur more than once every 1 min.

nodes.name: Dawnlight
nodes.description:
Casting Holy Prism or Divine Toll causes your next 2 Holy Power spending abilities to apply Dawnlight on your target, dealing 1,327 Radiant damage or 2,802 healing over 8 sec.

8% of Dawnlight's damage and healing radiates to nearby allies or enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Dawnlight's healing does not transfer to Beacon of Light.

nodes.name: Sun's Avatar
nodes.description: You link to your Dawnlights within 30 yds, causing 82 Radiant damage to enemies or 141 healing to allies that pass through the beams, reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Endless Gleam
nodes.description: Dawnlight's duration is increased by 0.5 sec when it heals an ally with full health.

nodes.name: Born in Sunlight
nodes.description: Dawnlight's critical strike chance is increased by 15% during Avenging Wrath.

nodes.name: Solar Grace
nodes.description: Haste is increased by 5%.

choices.description: Consecration heals you and 5 allies within it for 2 every 0.9 sec.

choices.name: Selfless Healer
choices.description: Flash of Light and Holy Light are 30% more effective on your allies and 40% of the healing done also heals you.

nodes.name: Blessing of Dawn
nodes.description: While you are above 85% health, 5% of all damage taken by allies within 20 yds is redirected to you, up to a maximum of 1,527 every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Lightbearer
nodes.description: 10% of all healing done to you from other sources heals up to 4 nearby allies, divided evenly among them.

nodes.name: Blessing of Dusk
nodes.description: Damage taken reduced by up to 10%, increasing as your health decreases.

nodes.name: Blade of Justice
nodes.description:
Pierce an enemy with a blade of light, dealing 48 Holy damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Divine Storm
nodes.description:
Unleashes a whirl of divine energy, dealing 65 Holy damage to all nearby enemies. 

Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Expurgation
nodes.description: Your Blade of Justice causes the target to burn for 27 Radiant damage over 9 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

choices.name: Swift Justice
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Judgment by 2 sec and Crusader Strike by 2 sec.

choices.name: Light of Justice
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blade of Justice by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Judgment of Justice
nodes.description:
Judgment deals 10% increased damage and increases your movement speed by 10% for 5 sec.

If you have Greater Judgment, Judgment slows enemies by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Avenging Wrath
nodes.description: Call upon the Light to become an avatar of retribution, increasing your damage, healing, and critical strike chance by 20% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Final Verdict
nodes.description:
Unleashes a powerful weapon strike that deals 140 Holy damage to an enemy target,

Final Verdict has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Judgment.

choices.name: Improved Blade of Justice
choices.description: Blade of Justice now has 2 charges.

choices.name: Holy Blade
choices.description: Blade of Justice generates 1 additional Holy Power.

choices.name: Righteous Cause
choices.description: Each Holy Power spent has a 6% chance to reset the cooldown of Blade of Justice.

choices.name: Art of War
choices.description:
Your auto attacks have a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Blade of Justice.

Critical strikes increase the chance by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Jurisdiction
nodes.description:
Templar's Verdict and Blade of Justice deal 10% increased damage.

The range of Blade of Justice is increased to 20 yds.

nodes.name: Tempest of the Lightbringer
nodes.description: Divine Storm projects an additional wave of light, striking all enemies up to 20 yds in front of you for 20% of Divine Storm's damage.

nodes.name: Rush of Light
nodes.description: The critical strikes of your Holy Power generating abilities grant you 5% Haste for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Sanctify
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Divine Storm take 20% more damage from Consecration and Divine Hammers for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Holy Flames
nodes.description: You deal 5% increased Holy damage to targets burning from your Expurgation.

choices.name: Improved Judgment
choices.description: Judgment now has 2 charges.

choices.name: Boundless Judgment
choices.description: Judgment has a 50% increased chance to trigger Mastery: Highlord's Judgment.

nodes.name: Zealot's Fervor
nodes.description: Auto-attack speed increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Heart of the Crusader
nodes.description: Crusader Strike and auto-attacks deal 10% increased damage and deal 10% increased critical strike damage.

nodes.name: Blade of Vengeance
nodes.description:
Blade of Justice now hits nearby enemies for 20 Holy damage. 

Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Empyrean Power
nodes.description: Crusader Strike has a 15% chance to make your next Divine Storm free and deal 15% additional damage.

nodes.name: Highlord's Wrath
nodes.description: Mastery: Highlord's Judgment is 50% more effective on Judgment and Hammer of Wrath. Judgment applies an additional stack of Greater Judgment if it is known.

choices.name: Templar Strikes
choices.description:
Crusader Strike loses a charge but is now a combo ability.

Templar Strike slashes an enemy for 44 Radiant damage and gets followed up by Templar Slash that deals 51 Radiant damage. Templar Slash always critically strikes.

choices.name: Crusading Strikes
choices.description: Crusader Strike replaces your auto-attacks and deals 83 Physical damage, but you auto-attack 20% slower.

nodes.name: Blessed Champion
nodes.description: Crusader Strike and Judgment hit an additional 4 targets but deal 25% reduced damage to secondary targets.

nodes.name: Burning Crusade
nodes.description: Your damage over time effects deal 10% more damage.

nodes.name: Blades of Light
nodes.description: Crusader Strike, Judgment and Blade of Justice deal 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Wake of Ashes
nodes.description:
Lash out at your enemies, dealing 111 Radiant damage to all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, and applying Truth's Wake, burning the targets for an additional 67 damage over 9 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are also stunned for 5 sec.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

nodes.name: Divine Wrath
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Avenging Wrath or Crusade by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Execution Sentence
nodes.description:
Unleash a heavenly blast around the target, dealing 176 Holy damage to all enemies nearby, and call down a hammer that slowly falls from the sky upon the target. 

After 10 sec, they suffer 20% of the Holy damage you dealt to all targets affected by the initial blast during that time.

nodes.name: Seething Flames
nodes.description: Wake of Ashes deals significantly reduced damage to secondary targets, but now causes you to lash out 2 extra times for 79 Radiant damage.

nodes.name: Empyrean Legacy
nodes.description: Avenging Wrath empowers your next Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn with 25% increased effectiveness.

nodes.name: Judge, Jury and Executioner
nodes.description:
Holy Power spending abilities deal 5% increased damage.

After casting Execution Sentence, your next 1 Holy Power ability will refund its Holy Power cost.

nodes.name: Radiant Glory
nodes.description:
Avenging Wrath is replaced with Radiant Glory.

Radiant Glory
Wake of Ashes activates Avenging Wrath for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Burn to Ash
nodes.description:
When Truth's Wake critically strikes, its duration is extended by 2 sec.

Your other damage over time effects deal 30% increased damage to targets affected by Truth's Wake.

nodes.name: Crusade
nodes.description:
Avenging Wrath now grants you 2% Haste.

Each Holy Power spent during Avenging Wrath increases Haste by an additional 2%, up to 20%.

ranks.description: Art of War increases the damage of your next Blade of Justice by 150%.
Avenging Wrath further increases the damage of Templar's Verdict and Divine Storm by 10%.
Art of War further empowers Blade of Justice to unleash a wave of Holy energy, dealing 385 Holy damage to its primary target and 156 Holy damage to all other enemies in its path.

nodes.name: Wrathful Descent
nodes.description:
When Empyrean Hammer critically strikes, 50% of its damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

Enemies hit by this effect deal 5% reduced damage to you for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Higher Calling
nodes.description: Crusader Strike, Hammer of Wrath and Blade of Justice extend the duration of Shake the Heavens by 1 sec.

nodes.name: Sacrosanct Crusade
nodes.description:
Wake of Ashes surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 10% of your maximum health.

Hammer of Light heals you for 5% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

nodes.name: Light's Guidance
nodes.description:
Wake of Ashes is replaced with Hammer of Light for 20 sec after it is cast.

 Hammer of Light:
Hammer down your enemy with the power of the Light, dealing 242 Holy damage and 124 Holy damage up to 7 nearby enemies. 

Additionally, calls down Empyrean Hammers from the sky to strike 3 nearby enemies for 16 Holy damage each.

Costs 5 Holy Power.

choices.name: Bonds of Fellowship
choices.description: You receive 20% less damage from Blessing of Sacrifice and each time its target takes damage, you gain 4% movement speed up to a maximum of 40%.

choices.name: Unrelenting Charger
choices.description: Divine Steed lasts 2 sec longer and increases your movement speed by an additional 30% for the first 3 sec.

nodes.name: Light's Deliverance
nodes.description:
You gain a stack of Light's Deliverance when you call down an Empyrean Hammer.

While Wake of Ashes and Hammer of Light are unavailable, you consume 60 stacks of Light's Deliverance, empowering yourself to cast Hammer of Light an additional time for free.

nodes.name: Zealous Vindication
nodes.description: Hammer of Light instantly calls down 2 Empyrean Hammers on your target when it is cast.

nodes.name: Hammerfall
nodes.description:
Templar's Verdict calls down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby enemy.

While Shake the Heavens is active, this effect calls down an additional Empyrean Hammer.

choices.name: Endless Wrath
choices.description: Empyrean Hammer has a 10% increased chance to critically strike.

choices.name: Sanctification
choices.description:
Casting Judgment increases the damage of Empyrean Hammer by 5% for 10 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Undisputed Ruling
nodes.description: Hammer of Light applies Judgment to its targets, and increases your Haste by 12% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Shake the Heavens
nodes.description: After casting Hammer of Light, you call down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby target every 2 sec, for 8 sec.

choices.name: Divine Exaction
choices.description: Divine Toll casts 2 additional times on your target at 150% effectiveness.

choices.name: Seal of the Templar
choices.description: Templar's Verdict damage increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Light's Judicator
nodes.description: Empyrean Hammer deals 20% increased critical strike damage and its critical strikes have 50% chance to grant an additional stack of Light's Deliverance.

nodes.name: Divine Hammer
nodes.description:
Divine Toll summons Divine Hammers that spin around you for 8 sec.

Divine Hammer
Strikes all enemies nearby for 51 Holy damage every 2 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Aurora
nodes.description:
After you cast Holy Prism or Divine Toll, gain Divine Purpose.

 Divine Purpose
Your next Holy Power spending ability is free and deals 15% increased damage and healing.

choices.name: Blessing of An'she
choices.description: The healing and damage of Holy Shock is increased by 15%.

choices.name: Lingering Radiance
choices.description: Dawnlight leaves an Eternal Flame for 6 sec on allies or a Greater Judgment on enemies when it expires or is extended.

nodes.name: Sun Sear
nodes.description: Holy Shock and Light of Dawn critical strikes cause the target to be healed for an additional 281 over 4 sec.

choices.name: Morning Star
choices.description:
Every 5.0 sec, your next Dawnlight's damage or healing is increased by 5%, stacking up to 10 times.

Morning Star stacks twice as fast while out of combat.

choices.name: Gleaming Rays
choices.description: Your Holy Power spenders deal 3% additional damage and healing.

nodes.name: Luminosity
nodes.description: Critical Strike chance of Holy Shock and Light of Dawn increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Second Sunrise
nodes.description: Light of Dawn and Holy Shock have a 15% chance to cast again at 30% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Walk Into Light
nodes.description: Infusion of Light occurs 100% more often during Avenging Wrath.

nodes.name: Eternal Flame
nodes.description:
Heals an ally for 1,436 and an additional 465 over 16 sec.

Healing increased by 25% when cast on self.

choices.name: Illumine
choices.description: Dawnlight reduces the movement speed of enemies by 50% and increases the movement speed of allies by 20%.

choices.name: Will of the Dawn
choices.description:
Movement speed increased by 5% while above 80% health.

When your health is brought below 35%, your movement speed is increased by 40% for 5 sec. Cannot occur more than once every 1 min.

nodes.name: Dawnlight
nodes.description:
Casting Holy Prism or Divine Toll causes your next 2 Holy Power spending abilities to apply Dawnlight on your target, dealing 1,327 Radiant damage or 2,802 healing over 8 sec.

8% of Dawnlight's damage and healing radiates to nearby allies or enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Dawnlight's healing does not transfer to Beacon of Light.

nodes.name: Sun's Avatar
nodes.description: You link to your Dawnlights within 30 yds, causing 82 Radiant damage to enemies or 141 healing to allies that pass through the beams, reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Endless Gleam
nodes.description: Dawnlight's duration is increased by 0.5 sec when it heals an ally with full health.

nodes.name: Born in Sunlight
nodes.description: Dawnlight's critical strike chance is increased by 15% during Avenging Wrath.

nodes.name: Solar Grace
nodes.description: Haste is increased by 5%.
